company.description:
# Home - RCLCO Real Estate Consulting

## Real Estate Economics | Management Consulting  
RCLCO Fund Advisors

## Real Estate Economics  
Management Consulting  
RCLCO Fund Advisors

## RCLCO is Organized into Three Service Areas

Leveraging quantitative rigor, real estate knowledge, and a codified process to help our clients make effective and enduring decisions about real estate.

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/2022-RFA-Logo-RGB-Horizontal-SMALL-ONLY-01-e1726256835595-300x61.webp)](https://rclco.com/rfa/)

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/double-chevron-green.jpg)](https://rclco.com/rfa/)

Customized real estate advisory to institutional investors built on a legacy of thought leadership and analytical rigor.

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/2022-RCLCO-Service-Lines-Logo-RGB-COLOR-SMALL-ONLY-REE-e1726256863904-300x63.webp)](https://rclco.com/real-estate-economics-market-research/)

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/double-chevron-orange.jpg)](https://rclco.com/real-estate-economics-market-research/)

Economics and market research services backed by 50+ years of analyzing trends and consultation to the best minds in real estate.

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/2022-RCLCO-Service-Lines-Logo-RGB-COLOR-SMALL-ONLY-MC-e1726256902940-300x62.webp)](https://rclco.com/management-consulting-for-real-estate-companies/)

[![](https://www.rclco.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/double-chevron-teal.jpg)](https://rclco.com/management-consulting-for-real-estate-companies/)

Collaborative and actionable strategy planning, and operational, portfolio, and capital consultation to real estate enterprises.

## RCLCO Partners with Our Clients to Look Around the Corner

Our clients turn to us to help them answer the most burning questions facing real estate investors. What trends in housing demand are lasting and which are cyclical? How do we risk-adjust real estate returns in an inflationary environment? How do real estate companies build resilient capital stacks and organizations to weather adverse market conditions?

Our research and publications include:

*   Articles and interactive tools analyzing the latest trends
*   Our podcast, _Conversations with the Best Minds in Real Estate_

## RCLCO Supports the Global Real Estate Investment Community

We are committed to make a meaningful difference by encouraging and facilitating forums for innovation, and through the RCLCO Foundation, which strives to change lives with affordable housing initiatives.

*   Live webinars analyzing the state of the market
*   CEO Summits and MPC University bringing leadership together
*   Discussion of the latest trends at industry events

## We Measure Our Impact by the Depth of Our Client Relationships, and the Fact that Best Minds in Real Estate Continue to Trust Us in Helping Drive their Businesses

## RCLCO in the News

  ![](https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/264/Untitled-design-4-2500x1397.jpg%202500w,%20https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/264/Untitled-design-4-2000x1118.jpg%202000w,%20https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/264/Untitled-design-4-1500x838.jpg%201500w,%20https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/264/Untitled-design-4-1000x559.jpg%201000w,%20https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/264/Untitled-design-4-500x279.jpg%20500w)

Freedman Consulting works with leading philanthropies and nonprofits to tackle the most challenging problems at the intersections of policy, philanthropy, and politics, creating lasting impact and innovations for the greater social good.

## What We Do

Our approach focuses on helping clients define their goals and develop comprehensive strategies that flexibly respond to client needs.

[Learn More](https://tfreedmanconsulting.com/our-work/)
